Headline: Red Line Delays
ShortDescription: Red Line riders, trains are running with residual delays following an unauthorized person on the tracks near Jackson. Service is resuming.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line riders, trains are running with residual delays and congestion following an unauthorized person on the tracks near Jackson.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #35 35th buses Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 31st/Rhodes
ShortDescription: Eastbound 35 35th buses will terminate at 31st/Rhodes due to a beach terminal closure because of a street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #35 35th buses will terminate at 31st/Rhodes due to a beach terminal closure because of a street blockage.

Allow extra travel time.
